experience.description: Delivering high-quality frontend solutions with a focus on modern React and Next.js development. Specializing in translating Figma designs into pixel-perfect, responsive code with smooth animations and contemporary visual effects.

experience.description: Built custom components with Elementor plugin for clients around the world. Achieved a client satisfaction rating of 4.8/5 and successfully delivered 15+ client projects.
